top.name: Binding Rune
top.rules_text: Prepare a glyph on a tile within 3. An enemy here at the start of its turn is rooted and takes 3 damage. Lasts 2 turns.

bottom.name: Sigil Link
bottom.rules_text: Link 2 of your prepared glyphs. When one triggers, the other triggers too.

upgrades.description: The rune holds longer. The link binds more glyphs.

changes.value: Prepare a glyph within 3. An enemy here at the start of its turn is rooted and takes 3 damage. Lasts 3 turns.
Link 3 of your prepared glyphs. When one triggers, the others trigger too.

upgrades.description: Greater Binding: the root lasts 2 turns and hits harder.

changes.value: Prepare a glyph within 3. An enemy here at the start of its turn is rooted (2 turns) and takes 5 damage. Lasts 3 turns.

upgrades.description: Sigil Web: each linked trigger also banks Weave.

changes.value: Link 3 prepared glyphs. When one triggers, the others trigger too; gain 1 Weave per link.

upgrades.description: Imprison: the glyph is reusable and silences while the Weave is high.

changes.value: Prepare a reusable glyph within 3. Each turn an enemy here is rooted (2t) and takes 5; silenced if Weave is 3+. Lasts 3 turns.

upgrades.description: Sigil Nexus: triggering one glyph triggers all linked, each +1 damage per other.

changes.value: Link 4 glyphs. Triggering one triggers all, each dealing +1 per other glyph. Gain 1 Weave per link.

upgrades.description: Oubliette: an enemy caught here is Named.

changes.value: Prepare a permanent reusable glyph. Each turn an enemy here takes 7 and is Named (half damage, cannot move) for 1 turn.

upgrades.description: The Lattice: link every glyph on the board, permanently.

changes.value: Link ALL your prepared glyphs permanently. Triggering one triggers all (+1 per other). Gain 1 Weave per link.
